title: Action maintainable by one or more co-owners.
doc_html:
Art. 1311.  Action maintainable by one or more co-owners.

Partitions can be sued for not only by the majority of the heirs, but by each of them, so that one heir alone can force all the rest to a partition at his instance.
doc_text:
Art. 1311.  Action maintainable by one or more co-owners.
Partitions can be sued for not only by the majority of the heirs, but by each of them, so that one heir alone can force all the rest to a partition at his instance.
